title: NSF Expeditions in Computing: Acorn project announced
summary: Acorn — The Dawn of Very Large Scale Brain Integrated Computer Systems — launches as an NSF Expeditions in Computing project uniting Yale, Princeton, UNC Chapel Hill, Iowa State, and UC Riverside.

title: Five research thrusts defined for VLBI computing
summary: The expedition organizes research across the Motif Abstract Machine, accelerator-rich hardware and software, wireless power delivery, and rodent brain validation—integrated with ethics and education efforts.
